data.name: Law School - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
Join us on Discord


關於此遊戲

Welcome to Stocklinburg Law College

Step into the prestigious halls of Stocklinburg Law College, where a young man's dream of becoming the best lawyer in America begins. This 3D adult visual novel takes you on a journey through the life of a first-year law student navigating the challenges of academia, relationships, and the transition into adulthood.

A Story Driven by Your Choices

Forge your own path in a world of high stakes and drama. Will you build lasting friendships, engage in fiery rivalries, ignite unforgettable romances, or do all of it? Your decisions will shape not only your story but also the lives and development of the characters you meet along the way.

A Unique Blend of Humor, Drama, and Emotion

"Law School" is more than just a game—it’s an experience. Laugh at witty banter, gasp at unexpected twists, and shed a tear for heartfelt moments. With its rich narrative and relatable characters, this visual novel promises an emotional rollercoaster.

Interactive Gameplay to Keep You Engaged

Immerse yourself in a world filled with interactive features:

  • Facegram: A social app where you can send messages, like and comment on photos, and deepen your connections with other characters.

  • Mini-Games: Test your skills in basketball matches, tackle exams, and explore freeroam environments.

  • Personalized GUI: Enjoy a sleek, customized interface that enhances your experience and makes every choice feel impactful.

Explore Mature Themes with Depth

This is a game for adults, exploring themes of ambition, love, sex, betrayal, and self-discovery. As you navigate the complexities of young adulthood, you’ll find a story that respects its players' intelligence while delivering tasteful, mature content.

Key Features

  • 10'000 4k downsized to 1080p renders and over 250 animations.

  • Over 138'000 words and 110 soundtracks with 3 exclusively made for Law School.

  • A story that balances humor, drama, and emotional depth.

  • A branching narrative shaped by player decisions with three distinct paths.

  • Mini-games to diversify gameplay and test your skills.

  • A fully interactive phone system with multiple functionalities. 

Why Play Law School?

Whether you're a fan of narrative-driven experiences, complex character arcs, or engaging gameplay, "Law School" has something for everyone. It’s a game that offers not just a story, but a journey you’ll remember.

data.short_description: A 3D adult visual novel where your choices shape relationships, rivalries, and a gripping story. Dive into drama, humor, mini-games, romance and a fully interactive social app in the journey of a young law student at Stocklinburg College.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or Higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間
